Infantry should prioritize killing enemy medics and low‑HP units, then move forward to close distance for attacks. Mortar should relocate to a spot with clear LOS (e.g., near x=22 or x=30) before firing, using world.path to navigate around obstacles. mbt should advance after infantry contacts enemies, using splash to damage multiple foes while avoiding standing next to allied infantry to prevent friendly fire. Commit to retreat when hp <30% (set retreat_until) to prevent None‑target errors and crashes. Future: test pathfinding for mortar/medic to reach cover, verify move_toward respects obstacles, consider adding an extra drone if points permit.
